text.title: Live Ticket Drafting (Shared-Screen Pattern) Core Rules
text.summary: 8 testable rules with rationale + source for live-ticket-drafting-shared-screen-pattern. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: Ticket MUST be drafted in the shared screen during the elicitation session, not as a post-session write-up.
rule.rationale: Live-elicitation research — applies to Live Ticket Drafting (Shared-Screen Pattern).

rule.statement: Each ticket MUST receive a verbal or chat sign-off from the contributor before the session ends; deferred sign-off is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Reducing async clarification rounds — applies to Live Ticket Drafting (Shared-Screen Pattern).

rule.statement: BA opens the session with a pre-filled ticket template (title, type, parent epic, AC shell); blank-canvas drafting wastes session time.
rule.rationale: Workshop-facilitation practice — applies to Live Ticket Drafting (Shared-Screen Pattern).

rule.statement: Each ticket draft MUST be timeboxed (default 8 minutes); over-running triggers a 'park or commit' decision, not silent over-run.
rule.rationale: Time-boxed facilitation — applies to Live Ticket Drafting (Shared-Screen Pattern).

rule.statement: If ambiguity remains, the ticket MUST contain an explicit `[NEEDS-CLARIFICATION]` marker plus the owner of the clarification; silent ambiguity forbidden.
rule.rationale: Spec-Driven Development research — applies to Live Ticket Drafting (Shared-Screen Pattern).

rule.statement: Session ends with a one-screen summary of all drafted tickets + their states (signed-off, needs-clarification, parked); summary persisted to engagement log.
rule.rationale: Session-closure discipline — applies to Live Ticket Drafting (Shared-Screen Pattern).

rule.statement: Session is either recorded (with consent) or transcribed minutes are produced; pure verbal sign-off without artefact forbidden.
rule.rationale: Audit-trail discipline — applies to Live Ticket Drafting (Shared-Screen Pattern).

rule.statement: If contributors are async-only or screen-share is prohibited, return `skipped`.
rule.rationale: Methodology applicability — applies to Live Ticket Drafting (Shared-Screen Pattern).
